trends.headline: T-Mobile is giving 5G customers Hulu and Netflix subscriptions, free - here's how to get them
trends.summary: If you're a T-Mobile customer on an Experience Beyond or Go5G Next plan, Hulu and Netflix (both with ads) are now included with your service.

trends.headline: Dangerous New Linux Exploit Gives Attackers Root Access to Countless Computers
trends.summary: The exploit, dubbed CopyFail and tracked as CVE-2026-31431, allows hackers to take over PCs and data center servers. The Linux vulnerabilities have been patched—but many machines remain at risk.

trends.headline: After Canada loosens citizenship requirements, thousands of people apply
trends.summary: After Canada changed a law opening up citizenship opportunities, thousands of Americans are trying to become citizens of their northern neighbor. It's partly for political and personal reasons.

trends.headline: A Dark-Money Campaign Is Paying Influencers to Frame Chinese AI as a Threat
trends.summary: Build American AI, a nonprofit linked to a super PAC bankrolled by executives at OpenAI and Andreessen Horowitz, is funding a campaign to spread pro-AI messaging and stoke fears about China.
